title: Realism Beyond
description: Realism Beyond is an amazing hand crafted Modpack that just makes the game more realistic, with a lot to explore
body:
Welcome to the **Realism Beyond** experience! This modpack is packed with goodies, including Distant Horizons 2.0, multiple Shaderpacks and various texturepacks like _Fresh Animations_ or _Fresh Moves_. This pack also has optimization mods to use high performance shaders such as _Rethinking Voxels_. This Modpack has many mods that make the game more realistic, including the most realistic sounds, perfect word generation, heat/cold, realistic trees and even more! **Feel free** to customize your experience by adjusting settings or disabling mods as you see fit. **Have a lot of Fun using this and have a great day!**
‚Äé‚Äé
‚Äé
‚Äé‚Äé ‚Äé
‚Äé 


‚Äé 
‚Äé 
### My Tip for better FPS:

- turn off VSync immediately (from 60 to 113 FPS)

- Render distance to 10 Chunks and
Simulation Distance to 8 Chunks
(from 113 to 123 FPS)
- go to video settings, then to performance, turn off _Use Entity Culling_ (+5 FPS)
- change the shader or/and the settings of the shader however you like
- Please set the RAM to a higher value than the default, about half the RAM your PC has!


### For better Gameplay: 
- Please change the FOV to 90 or higher

# Important!!!

‚Äé 

**You might want change some Keybinds!!!**


‚Äé 
### When you create a new world type this in the chat:
```
/function vanilla_refresh:other/actions/other/biome_disable
```
### Type this aswell in Chat:

```
/function vanilla_refresh:other/actions/other/subtitle_disable
```


**If you want you can disable that health display (_see below_) by typing this in chat**

```
/function vanilla_refresh:other/actions/mob/mob_health_disable
```
![Health Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3bb7aef571d510101a6bc262624e080bc3c7a31.png)


- I get around 98 FPS (48 Chunks Render Distance, 32 Chunks Simulation Distance, using Bliss Shader)

![48 Chunks, 32 Chunks, 98FPS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e25865b10de3ada5db0e85461716e7e493282c75.png)
